title: Mental Math Training Game

requirements.text: Implement a backend actor that generates random arithmetic problems covering all four operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division). Division problems must always produce whole-number answers. Each problem should include the question, the correct answer, and the operation type.

quotes: mental math game for all operation combination

acceptanceCriteria: Problems are generated for +, -, ×, ÷ operations
Division problems always yield whole-number answers
Problem numbers are within a reasonable range for mental math (e.g., 1–20 for harder ops, 1–50 for addition/subtraction)
Each problem returns question text, correct answer, and operation type

requirements.text: Implement a backend function to record and retrieve high scores. Each score entry should store the player's name (or anonymous label), number of correct answers, and timestamp.

quotes: score should be based on how many you got right

acceptanceCriteria: A submitScore function accepts a name and correct-answer count and stores it
A getTopScores function returns the top 10 scores sorted by correct answers descending
Scores persist across canister calls

requirements.text: Build a game screen with a 2-minute countdown timer. When the timer starts, a random arithmetic problem is displayed. The player types their numeric answer and submits (via Enter or a button). If correct, the score increments and a new problem appears immediately. If wrong, a new problem appears without incrementing the score. When the timer reaches zero, the game ends and the final score is shown.

quotes: you should have 2 minute during score should be based on how many you got right with the time

acceptanceCriteria: Countdown timer starts at 2:00 and counts down in real-time seconds
One problem is shown at a time
Correct answer increments score and loads next problem instantly
Incorrect answer loads next problem without incrementing score
Game ends automatically when timer hits 0:00
Final score screen shows total correct answers

requirements.text: Build a start screen that explains the game rules briefly and includes a 'Start Game' button to begin the session.

quotes: train you to do mental math quick

acceptanceCriteria: Start screen displays game name, brief instructions (2 minutes, answer as many as you can, all four operations)
A prominent 'Start Game' button transitions to the active game screen

requirements.text: Build a results screen shown after the game ends. It displays the player's score (number correct), allows them to enter a name and submit their score to the leaderboard, and shows a top-10 leaderboard fetched from the backend. Include a 'Play Again' button to restart.

quotes: score should be based on how many you got right

acceptanceCriteria: Results screen shows total correct answers prominently
Player can enter their name and submit score
Top-10 leaderboard is displayed with rank, name, and score
Play Again button resets the game to start screen

requirements.text: Apply a bold, energetic visual theme using a dark background with bright accent colors (e.g., neon green or vivid orange), large readable typography for problem numbers, and smooth transitions between problems. The style should feel fast-paced and focused to reinforce the quick-thinking nature of the game.

quotes: train you to do mental math quick

acceptanceCriteria: Dark background with high-contrast accent colors applied consistently across all screens
Problem text is large and instantly readable
Score and timer are always prominently visible during gameplay
Transitions between problems are snappy (< 150ms)

constraints: All arithmetic operations must be supported: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division
Division problems must always yield whole-number results (no decimals)
Game session is exactly 2 minutes long — no configurable duration in this version
nonGoals: User authentication or Internet Identity login

required: Bold lightning bolt math symbol logo mark with neon green glow on dark background (mathsprint-logo.dim_256x256.png)
